root.rep_text: รายงานรับชำระพิเศษ ( เก่า )

money_type_id.text: ประเภทการจ่าย

loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

combo.receipt_mode_status: R=ชำระเก็บไม่ได้/F=กองทุนภาระแทน

root.sql:
select tm.* from ( select sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id,
(select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) as s_item_amount,
(select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'F') as s_item_amount_mode_f,
sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode, case sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode when 'F' then 'ชำระหนี้กองทุนค้ำประกัน' when 'R' then 'ชำระหนี้เก็บไม่ได้' else '' end as receipt_mode_des,
( select sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ||' '||case sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode when 'F' then 'ชำระหนี้กองทุนค้ำประกัน' when 'R' then 'ชำระหนี้เก็บไม่ได้' else '' end as money_type_mode from sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) as money_type_name,
sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no||':'||(select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and (sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'FUN' or sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'MFEE' ) ) as fund_new, /*กองทุนใหม่*/ ( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'SHR' ) as by_share, /*ซื้อหุ้นพิเศษ*/
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'MFE' ) as fee, /*ค่าธรรมเนียมสมาชิก*/
0.00 as crem_amount, /*ฌาปนกิจ*/
(select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0)as dep from sc_com_m_receipt_item , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'DEP') as c_dep, /*เงินฝาก*/
sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id, /*ผู้บันทึก*/ sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as principal_amount_01,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as interest_amount_01,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as interest_amount_02,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as principal_amount_02,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as principal_amount_03,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as interest_amount_03,
( select nvl(count(sc_com_m_receipt_item.description),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as count_01,
( select nvl(count(sc_com_m_receipt_item.description),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as count_02,
( select nvl(count(sc_com_m_receipt_item.description),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as count_03,
(select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'FL') as free_amount
,(select mr.month_receive_month from sc_com_m_receipt mr where mr.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) as receipt_month
,(select to_number(to_char(receipt_date ,'mm')) from sc_com_m_receipt mr where mr.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) as month_receipt_date
--ส่วนสรุปหักเก็บไม่ได้-- ,( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_principal_amount_01,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_interest_amount_01,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_interest_amount_02,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_principal_amount_02,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_principal_amount_03,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_interest_amount_03,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LFE' ) as dep_66, /*เงินฝาก 66*/
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code is not null and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code != '0' ) --*เอาเฉพาะสัญญาไม่ปกติ and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'TBK' , 'CLR' , 'AOP' ,'TRL' ,'FUN' , 'CRC') ) as loan_code_principal_amount,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code is not null and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code != '0' ) --*เอาเฉพาะสัญญาไม่ปกติ and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'TBK' , 'CLR' , 'AOP' ,'TRL' ,'FUN' , 'CRC') ) as loan_code_interest_amount
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type, sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group
where sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no
and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' /*and ('!receipt_mode!' = 'F' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'F' or '!receipt_mode!' = 'R' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' or '!receipt_mode!' is null and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode not in('F','R'))*/
and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'TBK' , 'CLR' , 'AOP' ,'TRL' , 'FUN' , 'CRC' ) and ('!loan_type!' is null or exists(select null from sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = '!loan_type!'))
and exists (select null from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = 'พ6015134' -- and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date between '21/08/2017' and '22/08/2017' -- and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = 'TRB' group by sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ,sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no ,sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.finance_date ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ,sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type order by sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode, sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no )tm

r_mwa_finance_payment_day_nest_pay_detai.sql:
select (select loan_code from sc_lon_m_loan_card where loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.description)||'/'||sc_com_m_receipt_item.description as description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount from sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = {1} and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = {0} and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id not in ( 'TBK' , 'CLR' , 'AOP' ,'TRL' ,'FUN' , 'CRC')
/* and ('!receipt_mode!' = 'F' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'F' or '!receipt_mode!' = 'R' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' or '!receipt_mode!' is null and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode not in('F','R'))*/
-- and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = '!loan_type!' -- and ( '!loan_type!' is null or sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = '!loan_type!' ) and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' --and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = '!money_type_id!' /*WHERE*/
order by sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no

r_mwa_finance_payment_day_nest_pay_group.sql:
select sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount from sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = {1} and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = {0} and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id not in ( 'TBK' , 'CLR' , 'AOP' ,'TRL' , 'FUN' , 'CRC')
/*and ('!receipt_mode!' = 'F' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'F' or '!receipt_mode!' = 'R' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' or '!receipt_mode!' is null and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode not in('F','R'))*/
and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' -- and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = '!money_type_id!'
order by sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no

r_mwa_finance_payment_day_nest_loan_code.sql:
select sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc as "ประเภทลูกหนี้", count( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) as "จำนวนราย", sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount) as "เงินต้น" , sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount) as "ดอกเบี้ย"
from sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type
where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.description = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code is not null and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code != '0' ) --*เอาเฉพาะสัญญาไม่ปกติ --and ( '!loan_type!' is null or sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = '!loan_type!' ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'TBK' , 'CLR' , 'AOP' ,'TRL' ,'FUN' , 'CRC')
/*WHERE*/ and ('!loan_type!' is null or exists(select null from sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ='!loan_type!'))
--and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = pka.to_date('30/11/2018')
--and sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id = '01'
group by sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc order by sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc

r_mwa_finance_payment_day_nest_sum_balan.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type, count( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no ) as sub_count, sum(sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_balance_of_loan) as principal_balance_of_loan, sum(sc_lon_m_loan_history.interest_amount) as interest_amount
from sc_lon_m_loan_history ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_com_m_receipt
where sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code = null or sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code = '0' ) --*เอาเฉพาะสัญญาปกติ and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date between '!receipt_date_1!' and '!receipt_date_2!' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id not in ( 'TBK' , 'CLR' , 'AOP' ,'TRL' , 'FUN' , 'CRC' ) and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '1' and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_focus = '1' /* and ('!receipt_mode!' = 'F' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'F' or '!receipt_mode!' = 'R' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' or '!receipt_mode!' is null and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode not in('F','R'))*/
/*WHERE*/ group by sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code,sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type order by sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code,sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type
